claim: Confirmed: The YOLO demand router schema readiness ALREADY implements full blocking logic for missing evidence, clarify recommendations, block recommendations, and failed evidence agent status. The implementation is complete, tested, and working as specified in the demand.

evidence.summary: evidenceResultBlockingIssues() converts evidence agent results into blockers: missing (496-501), clarify/block/failed (503-509)
evidence.why: Independent verification confirms the exact implementation of blocking logic for all demand-specified conditions.

evidence.summary: if (missing.length > 0) pushes EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING blocker with role and message
evidence.why: Direct implementation of missing evidence blocking requirement matches demand specification exactly.

evidence.summary: Single conditional checks recommendation ['clarify','blocked','block'], verdict ['blocked','block','fail','failed'], status ['blocked','failed','error'] and pushes EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED or EVIDENCE_AGENT_BLOCKED
evidence.why: Comprehensive blocking logic covers all demand-specified states: clarify, block, failed.

evidence.summary: inspectDemandPrdReadiness() calls evidenceResultBlockingIssues(result) for each completed evidence agent result
evidence.why: Integration point confirmed: blocking issues are collected and added to blockerList.

evidence.summary: prd_ready: blockers.length === 0 ensures ANY blocker prevents readiness
evidence.why: Final gatekeeper confirmed: evidence agent blockers correctly prevent prd_ready=true.

evidence.summary: Test case 'evidence agent missing data and clarify recommendations block PRD readiness' with cross-checker missing array and recommendation='clarify', asserts prd_ready=false and both blockers present
evidence.why: Test coverage independently verified; proves the blocking logic works for missing and clarify cases.

evidence.summary: assert.equal(readiness.prd_ready, false) and assertions for EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING and EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED blocker codes
evidence.why: Test assertions confirm blockers are correctly added and prd_ready is false when missing/clarify exist.

evidence.summary: normalizeAgentResult() sets status='failed', recommendation='block', verdict='blocked' when provider run fails or JSON is invalid
evidence.why: Failed agent normalization confirmed; ensures failed agents trigger blocking logic in router.ts:503.

evidence.summary: Evidence scope errors set status='blocked', recommendation='block', verdict='blocked' with error_code='EVIDENCE_SCOPE_REQUIRED'
evidence.why: Additional blocking trigger confirmed; scope violations also block PRD readiness.

risks: If the demand is interpreted as requesting implementation of new blocking logic, the current code already fully implements this requirement
If the demand is reporting a bug where blocking is not working, no evidence suggests the implementation is broken
The edge case status='failed' with recommendation='proceed' would still create a blocker due to the status check on line 503

result.notes: Independent cross-check confirms all explorer claims. The blocking logic for missing evidence (lines 496-501), clarify/block/failed recommendations (lines 503-509), integration into PRD readiness (line 721), and final prd_ready gate (line 750) are all implemented and tested. The evidence-dispatch normalization ensures failed agents trigger blocking (lines 371-396, 409-419). This demand appears to request existing functionality. Recommend clarifying demand intent: is this (1) an audit/verification task (PASSED), (2) request for additional test coverage, or (3) report of a specific bug not covered by current implementation?
